parameters.text:
🧹 Starting Weekly Cache Cleanup...

📱 **Target Apps:**
• Instagram
• Facebook
• YouTube
• Chrome Browser
• WhatsApp
• Telegram

⏰ **Started:** {{ new Date().toLocaleString() }}

parameters.command: du -sh /data/data/* 2>/dev/null | sort -hr | head -10 || echo 'Cannot access app data directories'

# Clean additional system caches
echo 'Cleaning system caches...'

# Clear download cache
rm -rf /sdcard/Download/.thumbnails 2>/dev/null
rm -rf /sdcard/Android/data/*/cache/* 2>/dev/null

# Clear browser cache
rm -rf /sdcard/Android/data/com.android.chrome/cache/* 2>/dev/null

# Clear temporary files
rm -rf /sdcard/.temp/* 2>/dev/null
rm -rf /sdcard/temp/* 2>/dev/null

# Clear log files
find /sdcard -name '*.log' -type f -delete 2>/dev/null
find /sdcard -name '*.tmp' -type f -delete 2>/dev/null

echo 'System cache cleanup completed'

# Emergency cleanup if storage is critically low
available=$(df /sdcard | tail -1 | awk '{print $4}' | sed 's/[^0-9]//g')
if [ "$available" -lt 1000000 ]; then
  echo 'Performing emergency cleanup...'
  
  # Clear more aggressive caches
  rm -rf /sdcard/DCIM/.thumbnails 2>/dev/null
  rm -rf /sdcard/Pictures/.thumbnails 2>/dev/null
  rm -rf /sdcard/Movies/.thumbnails 2>/dev/null
  
  # Clear old downloads
  find /sdcard/Download -type f -mtime +7 -delete 2>/dev/null
  
  echo 'Emergency cleanup completed'
else
  echo 'Storage level OK, no emergency cleanup needed'
fi
